name: Falls and Hip Fracture Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for falls, hip fractures, and fall risk. Used in fall risk management measures, high-risk medication avoidance for the elderly, and osteoporosis management measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
